items.title: Not Lovin’ It: Here’s Inflation’s Impact on Your McDonald’s Meal Over the Last 10 Years
items.description: GOBankingRates used fast food giant McDonald's to show you just how much inflation has affected your food order at the Golden Arches.

items.title: Welcome to the Fast-Food Industry’s Crispy Chicken Summer
items.description: The crispy chicken sandwich wars are heating up, with fast-food heavyweights quickly expanding their offerings while upstart chains plot to capture more territory.
